items.summary: MIKEL ARTETA will head to Spain this summer for a holiday with his family. And the beautiful beaches of Mallorca are as good a place as any to get over a painful Champions League final defeat. items.title: Soccer Aid 2026 player ratings: England hero rolls back years as Hollywood star shines but ex-Man Utd star misses mark
items.summary: ENGLAND defeated a World XI 3-2 to win this year's Soccer Aid clash at London Stadium. Robbie WIlliams' men took a commanding 3-0 lead via Damson Idris' controversial opener and a Jermain Defoe double. items.title: Countdowns, banning timeouts and VAR changes: New laws for World Cup announced
items.summary: The International Football Association Board (IFAB) has announced a raft of rule changes for the World Cup, including expanded powers for VAR, 10-second substitutions and clamping down on tactical timeouts.

items.title: Exeter shock Leicester for crucial win to set up final-round play-off drama
items.summary: Olly Woodburn scored two tries as Exeter pulled off a stunning 35-26 victory in a pulsating contest as Leicester missed the chance to climb to second in the Gallagher Prem table.

items.summary: Liverpool will open formal talks with Andoni Iraola this week over becoming their new head coach.

items.summary: PLYMOUTH ARGYLE are allegedly set to release nearly their entire women's team, informing them of the decision via a "cold, impersonal email". items.summary: SANDRO TONALI was a surprise guest at WWE Clash in Italy - leaving football fans bamboozled. items.summary: ARSENAL fans have caused chaos in the streets of the capital as the club celebrates its Premier League title. items.summary: Marcelo Bielsa has omitted Luis Suárez from the Uruguay squad for the 2026 World Cup.

items.summary: Liverpool are set to open formal talks with Andoni Iraola this week as they work to appoint Arne Slot's successor, sources told ESPN.

items.title: U.S. beats Senegal as Pulisic nets 1st goal of '26...
items.summary: Christian Pulisic ended a five-month scoring drought for club and country with his first international goal since November 2024 as the United States beat Senegal 3-2 Sunday in the Americans' next-to-last World Cup warmup match.

items.title: Flores has ruptured ACL, will miss WC for Canada
items.summary: Canada and Tigres UANL winger Marcelo Flores ruptured his ACL during the Concacaf Champions Cup final against Toluca on Saturday and will miss the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Messi, Argentina land in U.S. on custom '1978' jet...
items.summary: Reigning World Cup champions Argentina arrived here on Sunday to begin preparing for their title defense, which starts with a match against Algeria on June 16 at Arrowhead Stadium, the home of the NFL's Chiefs.

items.title: Germany rout Finland ahead of match with USMNT
items.summary: Germany defeated Finland 4-0 in their first World Cup warm-up match but they will be sweating on the fitness of Deniz Undav.

items.title: Hamstring injury had Yamal scared of missing WC
items.summary: Lamine Yamal was scared of missing the World Cup after injuring his hamstring and prayed that he could recover in time.

items.title: ⚽What's happened since the 2022 World Cup?
items.summary: If you're readying to tune back into the World Cup but haven't watched much since Qatar 2022, what have you missed? Quite a lot, actually.
